children.heading: Annual independent audit
children.label: a Annual independent audit
children.text: The Bureau shall order an annual independent audit of the operations and budget of the Bureau.

children.heading: Annual GAO audit
children.label: b Annual GAO audit
children.text: The Comptroller General of the United States shall conduct an annual audit of the Bureau’s financial statements in accordance with generally accepted government accounting standards.
